title: Ugharro mining crusher
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}}
[[File:UgharroMiningCrusher-SSW2.png|thumb|right|250px|Ugharro mining crushers]]
'''Ugharro mining crushers''' were [[Mining/Legends|mining]] vehicles used by the [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaughts]] of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].<ref name="SSW:TESB">''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref> They were held together by chains, and the cockpit/Control Pod can eject if the mining crusher itself suffers irreparable damage.<ref name="Secrets">''[[Super Empire Strikes Back Official Game Secrets]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Ugharro mining crusher first appeared in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'', which was developed by [[LucasArts]] and [[Sculptured Software]], and published by [[THQ]]<ref name="SSW 2">''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref> on [[June 1]], [[1993]].<ref name="Year By Year">''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' {{1st}}
